initiatives.name: Max's Mission
initiatives.description: Max's Mission: To Save lives in Southern Oregon through the FREE distribution of naloxone, a medication that reverses an opioid overdose.

initiatives.name: BASE Oregon
initiatives.description: BASE is committed to supporting the advancement and excellence of Black people in Southern Oregon.

initiatives.name: Hawthorne Park Potluck
initiatives.description: We are a community of cooks, servers, and donors building a free-food network.
